title: Spiders make webs
description: When Spiders come for you they make Webs
body:
When Spiders naturally set their attack target, which they do every tick or so, even if the target doesnt change, they make a Web with a cooldown of 1.75 sec..

something I made to counter the Webs> [Spider Webs kinda burn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spider-webs-countered-by-fire)

I made this mod so I can use it with [Spiders Sensing you](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiders-looking-for-you)
 and [Nyfs Spiders
](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders)

my modrinth profile [auiki](https://modrinth.com/user/auikiouy)

If you have suggestions, questions or something of the like, my discord is auiki

(made with Mcreator)
